up.method: calculated qS = D*[S_consumed]/dW = 0.357*55.5/1.83 (glucose fully consumed, feed 55.5 mM, dW 1.83 g/L)

sec.method: HPLC; specific flux reported in Table 1 (conc 91.78 mM)

yields.Yxs: 0.183 gDW/g glucose (derived: dW 1.83 g/L / (55.5 mM*0.18016 g/mmol = 9.99 g/L))

product_yields.note: homolactic dominant at high growth rate; Table 1 mmol g-1 column

growth_records.cite: McLeod A et al. Effects of glucose availability in Lactobacillus sakei; metabolic change and regulation of the proteome and transcriptome. PLoS ONE (2017). DOI:10.1371/journal.pone.0187542. [PMC5669474]
growth_records.snippet: 23K 0.357 dW 1.83 Lactate Conc 91.78 Flux 17.84 mmol g-1 49.96 | Formate 15.13 2.94 8.24 | Acetate 10.57 2.06 5.76 | Ethanol 7.91 1.54 4.30 | %C balance 98.32; The CDM-LAB medium contained 55.5 mM glucose
growth_records.notes: Chemostat steady-state so mu = D = 0.357/h; td = ln2/0.357 = 1.94 h. Secretion fluxes (mmol/gDW/h) reported directly in Table 1 and verified as flux = D*Conc/dW (lactate 0.357*91.78/1.83 = 17.90 ~ 17.84). Glucose feed 55.5 mM fully consumed; qGlucose derived = D*55.5/dW = 0.357*55.5/1.83 = 10.83 mmol/gDW/h. Full CDM-LAB composition given by references [24,25], not in text (only glucose 55.5 mM stated) -> medium_composition_stated=false. SD in parentheses in source.

growth_records.medium: CDM-LAB (chemically defined medium for lactic acid bacteria), glucose-limited

up.method: calculated qS = D*[S_consumed]/dW = 0.045*55.5/1.26 (glucose fully consumed, dW 1.26 g/L)

product_yields.note: shift toward mixed-acid at low growth; formate +49.3% vs high growth rate

growth_records.cite: McLeod A et al. Effects of glucose availability in Lactobacillus sakei; metabolic change and regulation of the proteome and transcriptome. PLoS ONE (2017). DOI:10.1371/journal.pone.0187542. [PMC5669474]
growth_records.notes: Steady-state chemostat: mu = D = 0.045/h; td = ln2/0.045 = 15.40 h. Secretion fluxes read directly from Table 1 (mmol/gDW/h), verified flux = D*Conc/dW (lactate 0.045*76.25/1.26 = 2.72). Glucose qS derived = 0.045*55.5/1.26 = 1.98 mmol/gDW/h. More mixed-acid at low growth rate. Full medium by reference; only glucose 55.5 mM stated.
